{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Seeker
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Seekers are a type of person that can be called.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Start calling another seeker, then, I suppose,” the woman said with a sigh.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
